message:
Dear Sir/Madam,

An Off-Day Work Request has been submitted by {{ doc.employee }}. Please review the details below and take the necessary action.

Request Summary:

  • Employee: {{ doc.employee }}
  • Request Date: {{ frappe.utils.format_date(doc.date, "dd-MM-yyyy") }}
  • Workflow State: {{ doc.workflow_state }}
  • View Request: {% set off_day_req_link = frappe.utils.get_url() ~ '/app/off-day-work-request/' ~ doc.name %} Click here
name: Off-Day Work Request Approval
subject: Off-Day Work Request: {{doc.workflow_state}} - {{ doc.employee }}
